_notes: Source: tk-soft-patient (clinical enterprise profile). Target: US Core patient (US realm interoperability profile). Target adds USCDI extensions and identifier sub-element constraints at general level. Source has stricter telecom cardinality, photo ban, and custom extension set.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [tk-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least a family name or a given name), tk-pat-2 (warning: Active patients should have at least one telecom)]. US Core patient has no root-level constraints.
Extension employeeId[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (US Core does not define this extension).
Extension preferredLanguage[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension ethnicGroup[0..1 mustSupport=false] present in source is removed in target.
New extension race[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI v1 annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension ethnicity[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI v1 annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension tribalAffiliation[0..* mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension birthsex[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New extension sex[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension genderIdentity[0..* mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
Identifier slicing removed in target: source has named slices [mrn[1..1], national[0..1]]; US Core patient has no named identifier slices (only general sub-element constraints).
Source mandatory slice mrn[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent named slice in US Core.
Source optional slice national[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent named slice in US Core.

New mandatory constraint on identifier.system at general level: target adds identifier.system[1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source only constrains system within named slices (mrn, national), not at general identifier level.
New mandatory constraint on identifier.value at general level: target adds identifier.value[1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source only constrains value within named slices, not at general identifier level.
MustSupport removed on name.prefix (source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain name.prefix).
USCDI annotation extensions added to name sub-elements (name.use, name.family, name.given, name.suffix, name.period) in US Core target.
telecom cardinality relaxed: source [1..5 mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased, max cap removed, and MustSupport removed.
USCDI annotation extension added to telecom in US Core target.
USCDI annotation extension added to gender in US Core target.
birthDate cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true]. Min decreased (US Core no explicit min, inherits R4 base min=0). MustSupport preserved.
deceased[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; US Core mustSupport=false, no min change).
New binding added on address.state in target: source has no binding on state; US Core adds extensible(us-core-usps-state VS). New binding tightens acceptable state values.
MustSupport removed on address.country (source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain address.country).
USCDI annotation extension added to address in US Core target.
Binding removed in target: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status); US Core has no maritalStatus constraint.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] → target [0..*]. Ban removed (US Core does not restrict photo).
MustSupport removed on contact.relationship, contact.name, and contact.telecom (source mustSupport=true on these sub-elements; US Core does not constrain contact sub-elements).

communication.language binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/simple-language). Different value sets, same strength.
MustSupport removed on generalPractitioner (source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain generalPractitioner).
Reference target removed: source constrains to tk-soft/Practitioner; US Core has no generalPractitioner constraint.
MustSupport removed on managingOrganization (source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain managingOrganization).
Reference target removed: source constrains to tk-soft/Organization; US Core has no managingOrganization constraint.
